items.summary: The review runner now boxes every file referenced by prior compliance, fix, and diff evidence, and the component-repair engine fails closed if any requested authority file cannot be copied into the repair bundle.
The shared reviewer parser now rejects off-contract verdict tokens instead of normalizing them into approved.
executeBoard now writes a run postmortem on pre-round blocked exits, and result evidence counters now use separate validation and self-check issue arrays with semantically correct field counts.
The stale parseReviewerResponse comment was removed and replaced with a comment that matches the current fail-closed BoardBlockedError path.
audit-utils.ts is now part of the boxed review bundle, and buildAuditEnvelope emits a non-null review_mode sentinel of none for run-level artifacts outside a review round.
The two uniqueStrings implementations were moved to audit-utils.ts and are now named/documented by their intended semantics instead of remaining as duplicated private helpers.
